name: Bacon and Bean Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 can (19 oz) Kidney OR Pinto beans, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Prep time: 25 minutes.
2. Cut the bacon into thin slivers.
3. In a 12-cup saucepan, combine the bacon, celery, carrots, onion, turnip, beef broth, bay leaf, and thyme.
4. Bring to a boil; reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
5. Add the beans and continue to simmer for 5-10 minutes or until hot and flavors are blended.
6. Remove the bay leaf.
7. Serve in warm soup tureens or bowls.
8. Makes 8 servings.
Origin: Light & Easy Choices Shared by: Sharon Stevens.
